name: Chess Vibes
oneLine: US National Master who teaches club-level players how to break through rating ceilings.
bio: Chess Vibes is the YouTube channel of Nelson Lopez, an American chess National Master born February 5, 1988. He posted his first video in September 2020 and his content focuses on chess principles, opening tricks, puzzle walk-throughs and rating-climb commentary aimed at intermediate club players rather than super-GM coverage. After the channel took off he quit his job in software development to do chess content full time, and in July 2024 he launched the course site Breaking 1500. (Note: this is a different person from Antonio Radic / Agadmator.)
style: Calm, instructional board-analysis long-form on YouTube
